name: Hunan Tianrun Digital Entertainment &Cultural Media Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hunan Tianrun Digital Entertainment &Cultural Media Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells chemical fertilizers and chemical products in China. The company provides urea, liquid ammonia, methanol, agricultural-use ammonia bicarbonate, compound fertilizers, sulfur and crude methanol, and other products. It also manufactures and sells plastic packaging products. The company was formerly known as Hunan Tianrun Enterprises Holding Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hunan Tianrun Digital Entertainment &Cultural Media Co.,Ltd. in July 2016. Hunan Tianrun Digital Entertainment &Cultural Media Co.,Ltd. is based in Yueyang, China.
